EXPLANATION: The paper exists with this exact title, authored by James Matuk (J. Matuk), K. Bharath, O. Chkrebtii, and S. Kurtek — fully matching the cited authors. It appears on arXiv (1912.05125), PubMed, and PMC, and was published in the Journal of the American Statistical Association.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.05125
